signals.headline: King Charles III State Visit to White House Confirmed for April 27-30, Hosted by President Trump to Mark US 250th Annive
signals.raw:
King Charles III State Visit to White House Confirmed for April 27-30, Hosted by President Trump to Mark US 250th Anniversary** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][4]

Buckingham Palace announced King Charles III and Queen Camilla's first US state visit, including a White House banquet on April 28, following Trump's UK visit and amid GOP pushes for election reforms like voter ID via reconciliation[1][2]
matched_markets: Will the White House call a full lid by 6:30PM on April 14?
Will Trump say "Obliterated" or "Obliteration" during King Charles visit?
Will Chris Dudley win the 2026 Oregon Governor Republican primary election?

signals.headline: Minor catalysts: Rakuten Wallet XRP listing (yesterday), U
signals.raw:
Minor catalysts: Rakuten Wallet XRP listing (yesterday), U.S.-Iran ceasefire rally[1][2].

No sources report fresh confirmations, announcements, or resolutions post-6 PM UTC today; buzz remains speculative (e.g., unconfirmed Solana-XRP ties, pending CLARITY markup)[1][2][3][4]. Price action ties to yesterday's events and macro relief, not "just confirmed" news[1][5].

signals.raw: Confidence: HIGH**—based on consistent reporting of post-Easter escalations across sources, with no new official announcements.[1][2][3][4]
